first-ever active fixation left-heart lead cardiac resynchronization therapy (CRT), Attain StarFix lead demonstrated zero percent chronic dislodgement rate.

These dislodgement rates supported industry's largest longest-running left-heart lead clinical studies involving implants followed four years.
